india_trends.title: RBI, European Central Bank sign revised agreement on information exchange, central banking ties
india_trends.summary: The Reserve Bank of India and the European Central Bank have signed a Memorandum of Understanding. This agreement aims to boost cooperation in central banking. india_trends.title: Lionsgate Play doubles down on India with AI, originals, Rs 1,000 crore IP goal
india_trends.summary: Lionsgate Play is set to invest heavily in creating intellectual property worth Rs 1,000 crore. The company is shifting towards becoming a full-stack entertainment firm. It will focus on premium content, AI-led production and diverse monetization strategies. This move aims to accelerate growth and b

india_trends.title: Fed Data Suggest Japan Sold US Debt Amid Intervention
india_trends.summary: The Federal Reserve’s custody holdings of Treasuries fell for the first time in a month at a time Japan was likely intervening to support its currency, with market participants debating whether the nation offloaded US securities to fund its yen purchases.

india_trends.title: Is Airbnb’s long bet on India finally beginning to pay off?
india_trends.summary: India is still a tiny market for Airbnb 15 years after setting up shop here. But it is among its fastest growing regions, with booking surging 50% for two quarters in a row, driven largely by domestic travellers. &nbsp;

india_trends.title: Railways clears 2 projects in northwest Delhi to reduce congestion: CM
india_trends.summary: The Railways has approved crucial infrastructure projects for northwest Delhi. Widening of the Haiderpur-Badli rail overbridge will ease Mukarba Chowk traffic. An elevated loop connecting Shalimar Bagh and Sanjay Gandhi Transport Nagar also received approval. These projects aim to significantly redu

india_trends.title: Evening peak power demand exposes gaps in India’s energy transition: Citi
india_trends.summary: India's power sector is shifting focus from electricity shortages to ensuring reliable power during non-solar hours. Rapid renewable energy growth creates challenges for evening and night-time demand. The country needs enhanced transmission and storage infrastructure. Battery storage and flexible th

india_trends.title: The idea that Claude has feelings is great for Anthropic: Parmy Olson
india_trends.summary: Richard Dawkins, a prominent skeptic, recently declared a large language model named Claude to be conscious after a series of interactions. This experience highlights how AI's mimicked empathy can lead to human attachment, a commercially valuable trait for tech companies.

india_trends.summary: Balrampur Chini Mills Ltd has secured Rs 450 crore to fund its expansion plans. This capital will establish a lactogypsum processing plant and boost its poly lactic acid (PLA) facility in Uttar Pradesh. The company is venturing into bio-plastics with a new PLA plant set to become operational this ye

india_trends.title: CMS bags Rs 400 cr contract to manage 6,000 HDFC Bank ATMs
india_trends.summary: CMS Info Systems has secured a significant Rs 400 crore order from HDFC Bank. The deal involves managing 6,000 ATMs for the next five years. This partnership will also include advanced solutions like currency forecasting and AI technology. The company expects this to boost its revenue from private s

india_trends.title: Gold, silver seen range-bound for second week amid US-Iran talks: Analysts
india_trends.summary: Gold and silver may remain range-bound for a second consecutive week as investors assess developments in US-Iran peace negotiations and global macroeconomic data, analysts said.

india_trends.title: PM Modi rolls out Rs 9,400 crore Telangana package, spotlights textile revolution
india_trends.summary: Prime Minister Narendra Modi launched infrastructure and industrial projects worth nearly Rs 9,400 crore in Telangana.
